author: y4rr
content: Result: fixture regenerated — encoder keys renamed (attn_q_proj→weight_q_proj etc.), ffn_w3 added [d_model,d_ff], expected_output recomputed with SwiGLU 3-weight math (silu(w1(x))*w2(x) then w3). Decoder similarly updated with ffn_w3 and causal self-attn. All 22 conformance_nn_attention tests pass.
